---
name: Task
about: Track a development task, maintenance work, or technical debt
title: "[TASK] "
labels: task, needs-triage
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear description of the task.

## Objective

What is the end goal of this task?

## Category

- [ ] Maintenance (dependency updates, cleanup, refactoring)
- [ ] Documentation (guides, architecture, workflow notes)
- [ ] Development (new feature, integration, tooling)
- [ ] Testing (coverage, harness, CI)
- [ ] Release (versioning, changelog, deployment)
- [ ] Security (audit findings, vulnerability fixes)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Steps

1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Step three

## Files Affected

List the key files or directories this task will touch:

- `src/...`
- `prisma/...`

## Dependencies

Does this task depend on or block other issues?

- Depends on: #
- Blocks: #

## Risks

(Optional) Any risks or concerns with this task.

## Testing Strategy

How should this be verified?

- [ ] Unit tests (Vitest)
- [ ] Integration tests (Vitest + Prisma)
- [ ] E2E tests (Playwright)
- [ ] Manual verification

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (blocking other work)
- [ ] High (needed this sprint)
- [ ] Medium (schedule when available)
- [ ] Low (backlog)
